messages.content:
No worry, my Lagos brother. If you need egg, I go suggest some options for you. You fit try Jumia or Konga, dem dey deliver to Lagos and dem get different types of eggs, like farm fresh or layer eggs. Dem price dey around ₦500 - ₦1,500 per crate, depending on the type and size.

Or, if you prefer to buy from a physical store, you fit check out Shoprite or Spar, dem get eggs and other food items. You can also try your local market, like Mile 12 or Oyingbo, dem get fresh eggs and other food stuff.

Which one you think you go prefer, online or offline shopping?
